content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates multiple specific, timely AoA reads that change the conversation. He reads the smile in turn 6 ('I saw that smile, so I know something came to mind'), names the freeze explicitly as a somatic state in turn 10 ('does this feel like freeze? Like you're like, I can't — is that what's happening in your system?'), reads the surrender/quality of the blank place in turn 14 ('there's like a surrender to it almost'), and tracks her body reaction in real time in turn 26 ('What happened when I said that? What was your reaction when I said it?'). The reads are somatic (cold hands/feet acknowledged implicitly), energetic (the holy quality of the blank space), and pattern-level (recognizing the dissociating-in-the-coaching-room as wisdom, not pathology). Reads precede questions throughout, and the closing read in turn 30 names that the blank space and tears coexist — a precise perceptual call.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 10, 12, 14, 26, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Bypasses intellectual framing to get to the live question; not yet a named read but operative."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the smile he just saw — specific micro-read that grounds the next question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Calibrates threshold based on read of her freeze — operative read even if not explicitly named."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly names the somatic state: 'does this feel like freeze?' — textbook AoA read at the moment it matters."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the quality of the blank space ('almost holy') and tracks the enjoyment in it — perceptual read of state, not content."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'I saw it, like there's a surrender to it almost' — names what he perceived, precedes the body instruction."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "After disclosure, immediately reads her body: 'What happened when I said that?' — tracks the shown vs. said."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closing perceptual read — names that the blank space remains while tears come; both/and read of her system."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Strong example of reads-precede-questions throughout. Freeze is named somatically; the dissociation is read as wisdom rather than pathology."
}
